title: Lucky Block
description: Unleash chaos and destiny with Eternal Fortune — a custom Lucky Block datapack & resource pack for Minecraft 1.21.
body:
# 🎲 Eternal Fortune (Datapack)

Eternal Fortune is a custom lucky-block style datapack that transforms Minecraft into a game of chance. Break special Eternal Fortune blocks and discover your fate: legendary treasures, silly surprises, or dangerous traps. Each block is a gamble — will you be blessed by fortune, or struck by chaos?

✨ For the full experience, pair this datapack with the [Eternal Fortune Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eternal-fortune-resourcepack)
, which adds unique textures and models to bring the lucky blocks to life.

## 🌌 Features

### 🎲 Lucky Block Gameplay – Every Eternal Fortune block triggers randomized outcomes, from loot to traps.

### ⚖️ Balanced Loot Tables – A mix of epic rewards, useful items, silly junk, and dangerous events.

### 🐉 Exciting Encounters – Summon mobs, explosions, or strange effects that challenge your survival.

### 🔄 High Replayability – No two games are the same, making it perfect for races, challenges, or survival fun.

### 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Multiplayer-Friendly – Ideal for servers and lucky block races with friends.

## ✅ Compatibility

Works on Minecraft: Java Edition 1.21+

Compatible with singleplayer and multiplayer worlds

No mods required — just place it in your world’s datapacks folder

Pairs perfectly with the Eternal Fortune Resource Pack

## 🛠 Installation Guide

Download the Eternal Fortune Datapack .zip from Modrinth.

Put it inside your world’s datapacks folder.


```
.minecraft/saves/<your world>/datapacks/
```



Run /reload in-game or restart the world.

Place and break Eternal Fortune blocks to test your luck!

(Optional but recommended) Install the Eternal Fortune Resource Pack
 for custom textures.

## 🐛 Issues & Feedback

If you encounter bugs, broken loot, or want to suggest new features, please use the issue tracker on Modrinth. Make sure to include:

Minecraft version

Datapack version

Screenshots or logs if possible

## 💖 Support & Community

Eternal Fortune took many hours of design, testing, and balancing. If you enjoy it and want to support further development:

☕ Buy me a coffee

[💬 Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/mHQx8nwEMA)

🔮 Recommended Setup

For the best experience, use Eternal Fortune in:

Lucky Block Races – Compete with friends to see who survives the chaos.

Challenge Runs – Add chaos to your survival world and test your luck.

Minigame Servers – Spice up your server with unpredictable fun.

✨ Embrace chaos, seek fortune, and let fate decide with Eternal Fortune.
👉 Don’t forget to grab the [Eternal Fortune Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eternal-fortune-resourcepack)
 for the complete adventure!
